# Metrics

<!-- Code generated by go run ./script/generate-metrics-doc.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->
<!-- markdownlint-disable MD013 -->

This inventory is generated from exporter descriptor tags in `exporters/*.go`,
with sample Prometheus lines extracted from fixture-backed exporter tests.
Metric names use the default `--prefix=openstack`; replace the leading `openstack`
if you run the exporter with a different prefix.

Every service exporter also emits these scrape health metrics:
`openstack_<exporter>_up`, `openstack_<exporter>_exporter_scrapes_total`,
and `openstack_<exporter>_exporter_scrape_errors_total`.

When `--collect-metric-time` is enabled, source fetch durations are emitted as
`openstack_exporter_source_fetch_duration_seconds{service="<exporter>",source="<source>"}`.

The standalone `/metrics` handler also registers `openstack_exporter_build_info`.

Regenerate this file after changing metric descriptors:

```sh
go run ./script/generate-metrics-doc.go
```

Check that the generated file is current:

```sh
go run ./script/generate-metrics-doc.go -check
```

## Slow Metrics

Slow metrics can be disabled with `--disable-slow-metrics` and individually
re-enabled with `--enable-metric=<disable-key>`.

Metric | Exporter | Disable key
-------|----------|------------
`limits_backup_max_gb` | cinder | `cinder-limits_backup_max_gb`
`limits_backup_used_gb` | cinder | `cinder-limits_backup_used_gb`
`limits_volume_max_gb` | cinder | `cinder-limits_volume_max_gb`
`limits_volume_used_gb` | cinder | `cinder-limits_volume_used_gb`
`volume_type_quota_gigabytes` | cinder | `cinder-volume_type_quota_gigabytes`
`image_bytes` | glance | `glance-image_bytes`
`image_created_at` | glance | `glance-image_created_at`
`quota_floatingip` | neutron | `neutron-quota_floatingip`
`quota_network` | neutron | `neutron-quota_network`
`quota_port` | neutron | `neutron-quota_port`
`quota_rbac_policy` | neutron | `neutron-quota_rbac_policy`
`quota_router` | neutron | `neutron-quota_router`
`quota_security_group` | neutron | `neutron-quota_security_group`
`quota_security_group_rule` | neutron | `neutron-quota_security_group_rule`
`quota_subnet` | neutron | `neutron-quota_subnet`
`quota_subnetpool` | neutron | `neutron-quota_subnetpool`
`limits_instances_max` | nova | `nova-limits_instances_max`
`limits_instances_used` | nova | `nova-limits_instances_used`
`limits_memory_max` | nova | `nova-limits_memory_max`
`limits_memory_used` | nova | `nova-limits_memory_used`
`limits_vcpus_max` | nova | `nova-limits_vcpus_max`

`server_local_gb` | nova | `nova-server_local_gb`

## Deprecated Metrics

Metric | Deprecated since
-------|-----------------
`openstack_cinder_volume_status` | `1.4`

## Fixture-Backed Prometheus Samples

These samples are extracted from exporter test expectations backed by
JSON fixtures. Each metric family includes its `HELP` / `TYPE` lines and
one representative sample line.

### cinder

#### `openstack_cinder_agent_state`

```text
# HELP openstack_cinder_agent_state agent_state
# TYPE openstack_cinder_agent_state gauge
openstack_cinder_agent_state{adminState="enabled",disabledReason="",hostname="devstack@lvmdriver-1",service="cinder-volume",uuid="3649e0f6-de80-ab6e-4f1c-351042d2f7fe",zone="nova"} 1
```

#### `openstack_cinder_limits_backup_max_gb`

```text
# HELP openstack_cinder_limits_backup_max_gb limits_backup_max_gb
# TYPE openstack_cinder_limits_backup_max_gb gauge
openstack_cinder_limits_backup_max_gb{tenant="admin",tenant_id="0c4e939acacf4376bdcd1129f1a054ad"} 1000
```

#### `openstack_cinder_limits_backup_used_gb`

```text
# HELP openstack_cinder_limits_backup_used_gb limits_backup_used_gb
# TYPE openstack_cinder_limits_backup_used_gb gauge
openstack_cinder_limits_backup_used_gb{tenant="admin",tenant_id="0c4e939acacf4376bdcd1129f1a054ad"} 0
```

#### `openstack_cinder_limits_volume_max_gb`

```text
# HELP openstack_cinder_limits_volume_max_gb limits_volume_max_gb
# TYPE openstack_cinder_limits_volume_max_gb gauge
openstack_cinder_limits_volume_max_gb{tenant="admin",tenant_id="0c4e939acacf4376bdcd1129f1a054ad"} 1000
```

```text
openstack_cinder_snapshots 1
```

```text
openstack_cinder_up 1
```

```text
openstack_cinder_volume_gb{availability_zone="nova",bootable="false",id="6edbc2f4-1507-44f8-ac0d-eed1d2608d38",name="test-volume-attachments",server_id="f4fda93b-06e0-4743-8117-bc8bcecd651b",status="in-use",tenant_id="bab7d5c60cd041a0a36f7c4b6e1dd978",user_id="32779452fcd34ae1a53a797ac8a1e064",volume_type="lvmdriver-1"} 2
```
